mapper.select: select message_id, message_type, title, content, business_type, business_id, jump_target, read_status, receiver_user_id, receiver_user_name, event_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from nc_business_message where message_id = #{messageId} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into nc_business_message (message_type, title, content, business_type, business_id, jump_target, read_status, receiver_user_id, receiver_user_name, event_time, create_by, create_time, remark) values (#{messageType}, #{title}, #{content}, #{businessType}, #{businessId}, #{jumpTarget}, #{readStatus}, #{receiverUserId}, #{receiverUserName}, #{eventTime}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{remark})
mapper.select: select count(1) from nc_business_message where del_flag = '0' and receiver_user_name = #{userName} and read_status = '0'
